title: Shared A2A server — Helm values INTERFACE (contract only)
description:
The values contract a product or exec role sets to be served by the SHARED A2A server. This file is the INTERFACE, not the chart: it defines the value names, types, defaults and invariants that devops-engineer's chart MUST honour. No templates, no Deployment, no Service, no Argo Application is defined or implied here — those are devops-engineer's slice, gated on this contract.

Design constraint that shapes everything below: there is ONE shared server (decision #2), so per-repo configuration is DATA, not a chart per repo. Adding a product to A2A must be an entry in `tenants`, never a new deployment.

enabled.description: The gate. false = the shared A2A server is not deployed at all. Every FuzeInfra/FuzeAgent service is behind such a gate by convention.

tag.description: Immutable tag. Prod values bump this; never `latest`.

type.description: MUST be ClusterIP. Ingress is Cloudflare-tunnel-only; there is no LoadBalancer/NodePort surface.

protocolVersion.description: A2A protocol version served. Frozen for contract v1.

auth.description: Identity configuration for the callee-side enforcement described in authz.md.

oidcIssuerUrl.description: Issuer whose discovery document is projected into the card's `fuze-oidc` scheme.

oidcDiscoveryUrl.description: Optional override for where the A2A server fetches OIDC discovery + JWKS. When set (typically an in-cluster URL, e.g. `http://authentik-server.<ns>.svc.cluster.local:9000/application/o/<slug>/.well-known/openid-configuration`), the server fetches keys from HERE while STILL validating the token `iss` claim against `oidcIssuerUrl`. When UNSET, discovery is derived from `oidcIssuerUrl` (public issuer). Purely additive: existing configs that omit it behave exactly as before.

callerClaim.description: Token claim carrying the caller repo identity. Its value is the ONLY trusted caller identity (authz.md §2).

cardSigning.description: JWS signing key for the Agent Card. REQUIRED because the Fuze profile requires a non-empty `signatures[]`.

tenants.description: One entry per served product/exec agent. This array IS how a repo onboards onto A2A — no new chart, no new pod.

secretRef.description: Reference to an existing Kubernetes Secret (SealedSecret-provisioned). Secret VALUES never appear in values.yaml or in git.

tenant.description: Routing key echoed by clients; MUST equal the card's AgentInterface.tenant (card-projection.md §2).

repo.description: owner/name of the repo whose .fuze/manifest.json and agent-templates/roles/ are the projection source.

ref.description: Git ref the manifest/roles are read from. GitOps: this is the source of truth, never live-mutated state.

enabled.description: Per-tenant gate, independent of the server gate.

entryRole.description: Overrides manifest.a2a.entryRole. The role that serves a SendMessage naming no skill.

servingRoles.description: Overrides manifest.a2a.servingRoles — the roles projected into card `skills`.

external.description: Publish through the Cloudflare tunnel with an https:// interface URL. MUST be false for exec-tier tenants (card-projection.md §5).

provider.description: Managed-Agents runtime binding for this tenant's sessions — the values that reach agent-templates/providers/*.

environmentId.description: Environment the sessions bind to. Resolved from the role's `environment` when unset.

vaultIds.description: Vault ids passed to create_session. NEVER projected onto the card.

memoryResources.description: Memory stores mounted into sessions (e.g. the shared handoff store).

env.description: Extra environment for this tenant's sessions. Values MUST come from secretRef, never inline literals.
